---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the frontend dashboard
title: 'fix: [Brief Description of UI Bug]'
labels: ['bug', 'frontend']
assignees: ''
---

## 📝 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the visual or client-side bug is.

## 🚶 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to page '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See visual glitch or console error: ...

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to see (layout alignment, button click action, chart update).

## 🖼️ Screenshots / Video
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your problem. (For layout or cosmetic issues, this is highly recommended!)

## 🖥️ Environment Information
- **CPA2API-Manager Version / Commit**: (e.g., `v1.3.3-s.1` or commit hash)
- **Browser & Version**: (e.g., Chrome 124, Safari 17)
- **OS / Platform**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, iOS)
- **Node.js Version (if running locally)**: (e.g., `v20.11.0`)

## 📄 Console Logs
Paste any errors from your browser developer tools console (F12):
```text
// Paste console errors here
```
